productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Men Court Sequence Mid Brown Shoes
description: Designed for those who love those healthy runs, the adidas Court Sequence Mid combines lightweight breathable comfort and flexibility that makes running all the more pleasurable.UpperSynthetic upper with perforations in the forefoot and towards the heel for ventilation and comfortStrategically placed synthetic overlays and stitched detailing for added shoe structureadidas Patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleLacing system with a padded and mesh fabric tongue and collar for optimal comfort and custom FitPadded sockliner for all-day comfortBranding at the back of the collarMidsoleRubber midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleGrooves and a suction point at the toe for great tractionShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
